---
id: password-reset-request
title: "Request a password reset email"
description: "Sends a password reset link to the email address associated with the given username. Always returns success to avoid user enumeration."
sidebar_label: "Request a password reset email"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/public/churchcrm-public-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Request a password reset email"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/public/user/password-reset"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sends a password reset link to the email address associated with the given username. Always returns success to avoid user enumeration.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
